title: Finish M3: variantpool + MCP server + fixit rewire onto plandag
intent: Continue M3 work: plandag is shipped and tested. Remaining: variantpool for subprocess lifecycles, MCP server (stdio first, HTTP later), port fixit Emit onto plandag, replace markdown plans_gate with plandag-based HasActivePlan check, and ship release tag with Homebrew/Scoop/Chocolatey manifests landing in jbcom/pkgs.

tasks.description: Create internal/variantpool package: Spawn(), Say(), Kill(), Status() primitives over os/exec. Parent-death signaling via syscall.SysProcAttr.Pdeathsig on Linux, lifeline-pipe fallback on macOS and Windows. Heartbeats written to plandag.HeartbeatSession + per-variant row updates.
acceptance: internal/variantpool/ package exists with Spawn/Say/Kill/Status
Test: spawn fake-claude subprocess, send a message, receive response, kill cleanly
Test: parent process dies → child subprocess terminates within 2s via lifeline pipe
Heartbeat runs every 30s and updates session_variants.last_heartbeat

tasks.description: Create internal/proclife package with per-platform parent-death primitives. linux.go uses Pdeathsig. darwin.go uses kqueue NOTE_EXIT. windows.go uses Job Objects. portable.go uses lifeline pipe as the universal fallback that works on all three without syscalls.
acceptance: Linux build uses Pdeathsig via go:build linux
Darwin build uses kqueue via go:build darwin
Windows build uses CreateJobObject via go:build windows
Lifeline pipe wraps exec.Cmd on all platforms
proclife_test.go verifies child self-terminates on parent death

tasks.description: Port internal/fixit/emit.go to write plans into plandag.CreatePlan + CreateTask + AddDep instead of emitting markdown. Keep the markdown renderer as a separate Render() function callable via `radioactive_ralph plan render <plan-id>` for human-readable output.
acceptance: emit.go invokes plandag.CreatePlan + CreateTask + AddDep
Existing fixit tests pass against the new emit path
radioactive_ralph plan render <id> produces the legacy markdown shape for UX continuity
fixit no longer writes files under .radioactive-ralph/plans/*.md

tasks.description: Replace plans_gate.go's markdown-file check with plandag.ListPlans(active) >= 1. Update the error message to tell operators to run fixit if no active plan exists. Delete the old plans_gate.go once the new gate lands.
acceptance: cmd/radioactive_ralph/plans_gate.go replaced or deleted
Gate checks plandag instead of markdown
Error message references `radioactive_ralph run --variant fixit --advise`
Integration tests updated to seed a plandag plan instead of markdown

tasks.description: internal/mcp/ package exposing plan.list / plan.show / plan.next_ready / plan.claim / plan.mark_done / variant.spawn / variant.say / variant.status tools over stdio transport via modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk. Server reads session_id from env or generates one on start + writes to sessions table.
acceptance: go get github.com/modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk
internal/mcp/server/stdio.go implements NewStdioServer()
All six plan.* tools routed to plandag methods
All three variant.* tools routed to variantpool methods
Smoke test: pipe a JSON-RPC request to stdin, verify response on stdout

tasks.description: Add `radioactive_ralph serve --mcp` subcommand. Defaults to stdio; --http :port binds HTTP+SSE transport. Integrates with plandag (opens once, shared across tool handlers) and variantpool (one pool per server).
acceptance: radioactive_ralph serve --mcp runs stdio server to completion
Ctrl-C shuts down gracefully (plandag.CloseSession fires)
--http :9876 binds a working HTTP+SSE endpoint
Integration test: spawn server in subprocess, call a tool, verify response

tasks.description: Update the 10 skills/<variant>/SKILL.md files to invoke `radioactive_ralph serve --mcp` as a subprocess and route variant actions through MCP tools instead of shelling out to the binary directly.
acceptance: All 10 SKILL.md files reference radioactive_ralph serve --mcp
Example MCP tool invocation in each skill's Running section
Each skill documents the variant.spawn call it makes

tasks.description: Tag v0.7.0 on main; GoReleaser publishes Homebrew formula + Scoop manifest + Chocolatey nupkg to jbcom/pkgs + chocolatey community feed. Verify brew install radioactive-ralph works end-to-end from a fresh Mac.
acceptance: git tag v0.7.0 pushed
GoReleaser CI run succeeds
Formula/radioactive-ralph.rb on jbcom/pkgs main has real sha256 checksums
brew tap jbcom/tap && brew install radioactive-ralph installs the built binary
Chocolatey community feed shows radioactive-ralph 0.7.0
